title: Trigger Runtime CI on compiler submodule pointer bumps

source.subject: fix(ci): trigger Runtime CI on compiler submodule pointer bumps

body:
GitHub Actions triggers Runtime CI when the superrepo compiler submodule SHA changes, catching runtime-only regressions after integration merges.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c0ac8fd`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c0ac8fd)
- **Subject:** fix(ci): trigger Runtime CI on compiler submodule pointer bumps
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`
- **Domain:** `tooling`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-post-merge-ci`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **CI and integration hardening** (`v03-post-merge-ci`).
